Source: bemap-services-v2/ev-routing/bemap-ev-smart-routing-response.js

/**
 * BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - EvSmartRoutingResponse (v1.5)
 *
 * Strongly-typed response from `POST service/evsmartrouting/1.0`.
 *
 * Wire shape mirrors `EvSmartRoutingResponse` on the server side
 * (`bemap_idea/.../service/v1_0_0/model/evSmartRouting/response/EvSmartRoutingResponse.java`):
 *
 *   {
 *     logTag,
 *     journey: { distance, duration, batteryLevel, consumed, chargingTime,
 *                chargingCost, departureTime, arrivalTime, vehicle,
 *                savedCo2Emissions },
 *     inputInfo,
 *     boundingBox,
 *     route: { stepPoints, polyline?, encodedPolyline?, events?, timeSlotWarns? }
 *   }
 *
 * @public
 * @constructor
 * @param {Object} options Parsed JSON response from the server.
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse = function(options) {
    var opts = options || {};
    this.logTag = opts.logTag || null;
    this.journey = opts.journey || null;
    this.inputInfo = opts.inputInfo || null;
    this.boundingBox = opts.boundingBox || null;
    this.route = opts.route || null;
    this.debugStat = opts.debugStat || null;
};

bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getLogTag = function() { return this.logTag; };
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getJourney = function() { return this.journey; };
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getInputInfo = function() { return this.inputInfo; };
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getRoute = function() { return this.route; };
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getDebugStat = function() { return this.debugStat; };

/**
 * `bemap.BoundingBox` covering the whole journey, or `null` when absent.
 * `fromJson` already lifts `{topLeft, bottomRight}` to a `bemap.BoundingBox`,
 * so under normal conditions this returns a `bemap.BoundingBox`. If the
 * BoundingBox lift failed (e.g. malformed payload), the raw JSON object is
 * returned so callers can still inspect it.
 *
 * @public
 * @return {bemap.BoundingBox|null}
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getBoundingBox = function() {
    return this.boundingBox || null;
};

/**
 * Charging stops in order along the journey, parsed into `EvStepPoint`.
 * @public
 * @return {Array.<bemap.EvStepPoint>}
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getStepPoints = function() {
    if (!this.route || !Array.isArray(this.route.stepPoints)) return [];
    return this.route.stepPoints;
};

/**
 * Route polyline as an Array of `bemap.Coordinate`, or empty when the
 * server omitted the polyline (e.g. `pl=false` in the request).
 * @public
 * @return {Array.<bemap.Coordinate>}
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getPolyline = function() {
    if (!this.route || !Array.isArray(this.route.polyline)) return [];
    return this.route.polyline.map(function(p) {
        var lon = (typeof p.getLon === 'function') ? p.getLon() : (p.lon !== undefined ? p.lon : p.longitude);
        var lat = (typeof p.getLat === 'function') ? p.getLat() : (p.lat !== undefined ? p.lat : p.latitude);
        return new bemap.Coordinate(lon, lat);
    });
};

/**
 * Google-encoded polyline string, when the request asked for `encodedPolyline`.
 * @public
 * @return {String|null}
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getEncodedPolyline = function() {
    return (this.route && this.route.encodedPolyline) ? this.route.encodedPolyline : null;
};

/**
 * Distance of the whole journey, in metres.
 * @public
 * @return {Number} `0` when the journey is missing.
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getDistance = function() {
    return (this.journey && this.journey.distance) ? this.journey.distance : 0;
};

/**
 * Duration of the whole journey, in seconds (including charging stops).
 * @public
 * @return {Number} `0` when the journey is missing.
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getDuration = function() {
    return (this.journey && this.journey.duration) ? this.journey.duration : 0;
};

/**
 * Total time spent charging across all stops, in seconds.
 * @public
 * @return {Number}
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getChargingTime = function() {
    return (this.journey && this.journey.chargingTime) ? this.journey.chargingTime : 0;
};

/**
 * Remaining battery level (percent, 0-100) at the end of the trip.
 * @public
 * @return {Number}
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getArrivalBatteryLevel = function() {
    return (this.journey && typeof this.journey.batteryLevel === 'number') ? this.journey.batteryLevel : 0;
};

/**
 * Total energy consumed across the whole journey, in kWh.
 * @public
 * @return {Number}
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getConsumed = function() {
    return (this.journey && typeof this.journey.consumed === 'number') ? this.journey.consumed : 0;
};

/**
 * Saved CO2 emissions (kg), when `co2Emissions` was set in the request.
 * @public
 * @return {Number|null}
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.prototype.getSavedCo2Emissions = function() {
    if (!this.journey || typeof this.journey.savedCo2Emissions !== 'number') return null;
    return this.journey.savedCo2Emissions;
};

/**
 * Parse the raw JSON response into a `bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse`.
 *
 * @public
 * @param {Object} json
 * @return {bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse}
 */
bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse.fromJson = function(json) {
    if (!json) return new bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse();

    var route = null;
    if (json.route) {
        route = {
            stepPoints: Array.isArray(json.route.stepPoints)
                ? json.route.stepPoints.map(function(s) { return new bemap.EvStepPoint(s); })
                : [],
            polyline: Array.isArray(json.route.polyline) ? json.route.polyline.slice() : null,
            encodedPolyline: json.route.encodedPolyline || null,
            events: Array.isArray(json.route.events) ? json.route.events.slice() : null,
            timeSlotWarns: Array.isArray(json.route.timeSlotWarns) ? json.route.timeSlotWarns.slice() : null,
            chargingStationPools: Array.isArray(json.route.chargingStationPools) ? json.route.chargingStationPools.slice() : null
        };
    }

    var bbox = null;
    if (json.boundingBox) {
        var b = json.boundingBox;
        if (b.topLeft && b.bottomRight) {
            try {
                bbox = new bemap.BoundingBox(
                    new bemap.Coordinate(b.topLeft.lon, b.topLeft.lat),
                    new bemap.Coordinate(b.bottomRight.lon, b.bottomRight.lat)
                );
            } catch (e) {
                // Fall back to the raw payload so callers can still inspect
                // it, but surface the failure on the console rather than
                // swallow it silently.
                if (typeof console !== 'undefined' && console.warn) {
                    console.warn('bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse: bounding-box parse failed', e);
                }
                bbox = b;
            }
        } else {
            bbox = b;
        }
    }

    return new bemap.EvSmartRoutingResponse({
        logTag: json.logTag || null,
        journey: json.journey || null,
        inputInfo: json.inputInfo || null,
        boundingBox: bbox,
        route: route,
        debugStat: json.debugStat || null
    });
};
